description_long: This is a dark wooden nightstand with a tall, attached rectangular mirror framed in matching wood. The nightstand features three spacious drawers, each adorned with ornate carved patterns and fitted with curved, golden-brown bar pull handles. The sides of the nightstand are decorated with intricate floral carvings, adding a touch of elegance. The base of the nightstand has a scalloped apron and four short, sturdy legs with subtle decorative shaping. The mirror is bordered with a carved wooden frame, complementing the overall classic and ornate design. The finish is smooth and slightly glossy, highlighting the rich wood grain and craftsmanship.
description: Ornate dark wood nightstand with three drawers, golden-brown handles, and a tall attached mirror framed in carved wood.
description_view_0: Side view showing the floral carved panel and the depth of the nightstand with the mirror's thickness visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the three drawers with golden-brown handles, ornate carvings, and the full height of the attached mirror.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the floral carved panel and the nightstand's profile.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain wooden back of the nightstand and mirror, with no visible handles or carvings.
attribute_leg_design: short carved wooden legs with scalloped apron
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: against a wall, beside a bed or in a bedroom corner
